name: heroboard
description: Heroboard: gamified dev board for Claude Code — MCP task tools, human-presence effort heartbeats, and /heroboard commands.

api_key.title: Heroboard API key
api_key.description: Optional — prefer  /heroboard:login  (browser sign-in). Paste a key here only as a fallback: Heroboard → Settings → MCP → “+ New key”. Stored securely in your system keychain.

presence_ticker.title: Continuous presence ticker
presence_ticker.description: Keep effort accruing every ~60s while a session is active — i.e. you prompted within the last 5 min — so time tracks live presence, not just an open window. Goes idle automatically once you stop prompting. On by default; turn off to count only per-prompt events.
